createOrg.title: Create Organization
createOrg.subtitle: Register your organization in the data space.

pontusX.title: Pontus-X Onboarding Process
pontusX.description: Before creating your organization, you must complete the verification process with deltaDAO/Pontus-X.
pontusX.step1: Access the deltaDAO/Pontus-X onboarding platform and register your organization.
pontusX.step2: Complete the verification process for your organization. This may take a few business days.
pontusX.step3: Upon completion, you will receive a verified wallet to use in the next step.
pontusX.warning: The organization will only be created if the Pontus-X onboarding process was completed successfully. If you haven't done it yet, complete it first.
pontusX.checkbox: I have completed the onboarding and I have my verified wallet

walletImport.title: Import Verified Wallet
walletImport.description: Upload the keypair file (.json) you downloaded during onboarding and enter its password.
walletImport.infoText: The keypair file and password are used to verify your wallet and register the organization on the platform. They are transmitted securely.

confirmation.title: Confirm creation
confirmation.description: Review the details before creating the organization.
confirmation.infoText: When creating the organization, it will be verified that the wallet is correctly registered on Pontus-X. The organization name will be automatically extracted from the on-chain identity.
confirmation.creatingDesc: We are verifying the wallet and registering the organization. Do not close this page.
confirmation.errorDefault: Could not import the organization. Check your file and password.
confirmation.successDesc: You can now operate with your new company.
